queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of lacking a primary checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical investigation into the inverse correlation between negative checking account balances and credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-reducing implications of maintaining minimal savings account balances on credit default probability.
